ddls:
CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the region belongs to */,
  "municipality" TEXT /* Municipality the region belongs to */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the region's centroid */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the region's centroid */,
  "area" REAL /* Area of the region in square kilometers */,
  "population_density" REAL /* Population density of the region */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the region's data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "datasets" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region the dataset belongs to */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the data was collected */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the region for that year */,
  "data_source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source */,
  "collection_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was collected */,
  "data_quality_score" REAL /* Quality score of the dataset (0-1) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_datasets_data_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_datasets_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "population_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each population metric */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset the metric belongs to */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the population metric (e.g., population, urbanization rate) */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the population metric */,
  "metric_type" TEXT /* Type of metric (e.g., demographic, economic) */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the metric */,
  "yearly_change" REAL /* Yearly change in the metric value */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_population_metrics_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL for accessing the data source */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the data source was last updated */,
  "reliability_score" REAL /* Reliability score of the data source (0-1) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_collections" (
  "collection_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data collection */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset the collection belongs to */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the source the collection comes from */,
  "collection_date" TEXT /* Date the data was collected */,
  "collection_method" TEXT /* Method used for data collection (e.g., survey, census) */,
  "collection_cost" REAL /* Cost of data collection */,
  "collection_quality_score" REAL /* Quality score of the data collection (0-1) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("collection_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_collections_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_collections_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, policymaker) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department or agency the user belongs to */,
  "access_level" INTEGER /* Access level of the user (e.g., 1 for basic, 2 for advanced) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the dataset */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the dataset was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., read, write) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the dataset */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used for access (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "visualizations" (
  "visualization_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each visualization */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset the visualization is based on */,
  "visualization_name" TEXT /* Name of the visualization */,
  "visualization_type" TEXT /* Type of visualization (e.g., bar chart, line graph) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the visualization */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date when the visualization was created */,
  "last_modified" TEXT /* Date when the visualization was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("visualization_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_visualizations_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_visualizations_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
